summary: Sanctions.io API Integration Testing Complete. All new features working correctly: Demo mode banner, API key management, screening with sanctions/pep/adverse_media checks. 16/16 new tests passed. Dashboard and existing features verified working.
passed_tests: Login with shyam@rudrik.io / Assword@0231
GET /api/settings/screening-status returns demo mode when no key configured
POST /api/settings/sanctions-api-key with invalid key returns 400
POST /api/settings/sanctions-api-key with empty key removes key and switches to demo
DELETE /api/settings/sanctions-api-key switches to demo mode
POST /api/screenings/run with sanctions check only in demo mode
POST /api/screenings/run with all checks (sanctions, pep, adverse_media) in demo mode
Screening returns risk score and level (LOW/MEDIUM/HIGH/CRITICAL)
Screening with FATF high-risk country (IR) elevates risk score
Screening requires fullName field (400 if missing)
Screening returns matched_entities array with proper structure
GET /api/screenings returns paginated screening history
GET /api/screenings?risk_level=LOW filters by risk level
Screening page loads with Demo Mode banner
Screening page shows DEMO MODE status pill (yellow)
Add API Key button shows API key input panel
API key input is password type
Save & Activate button present in API key panel
Close button dismisses API key panel
New Screening form shows Sanctions, PEP, Adverse Media checkboxes (all checked by default)
Running screening shows result card with Demo Data provider badge
Result card shows risk score circle, check results, matched entities
Dashboard loads with all widgets (31 customers, 12 pending reviews, 3 high risk, 12 open cases)
Sidebar shows Rudrik logo linking to rudrik.io
Footer shows www.rudrik.io link
critical_code_review_comments: Sanctions.io service properly implements demo mode fallback when no API key configured
API key validation calls real Sanctions.io API - returns 301 redirect for invalid keys (expected behavior)
Screening endpoint correctly integrates with sanctions_io_service for all check types
Frontend properly displays demo mode indicators and API key management UI
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sanctions.io API integration fully tested and working in demo mode. No real API key available for live mode testing. All new endpoints (GET /api/settings/screening-status, POST/DELETE /api/settings/sanctions-api-key) working correctly. Screening page UI shows demo mode banner, status indicator, and API key management. Previous test failures (kyc_status, risk_breakdown, cdd_tier assertions) are pre-existing issues unrelated to this feature.

mocked_apis.Sanctions.io: MOCKED (demo mode - no real API key configured)
